Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}y'know, the two of us have never really hung out before {f 1 3 138}[n]seems like a good time for a breather, so how 'bout we go have some fun?[n]{f 1 5 0}i'll stick around in the classroom, so just lemme know if you're down {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}if you spend your vacation doing nothing, summer will be over before you know it! {f 1 3 138}[n]listen man, you gotta help me with my crazy genius idea {f 1 3 135}[n]so hurry and haul your ass to the strip mall! {f 1 3 140}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}a lot's been happening all at once, so i was wondering how you've been holding up.[n]{f 1 5 0}wanna grab a bite for a change of pace?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}you good, man? {f 1 3 137}[n]come hang with me after school {f 1 3 136}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}dude, it's so freakin' hot outside, i'm melting.[n]{f 1 5 0}wanna go cool off at the movie theater? let's watch a cool hero flick and chill.[n]{f 1 5 0}i heard there's only one screening right now, so hit me up if you're down[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}dude, are you even checking your messages?[n]{f 1 5 0}you're killing me man, why you gotta leave me hanging? {f 1 3 133}[n]let's hang out soon {f 1 3 136}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}you get my last message?[n]{f 1 5 0}all my genius summer plan needs is you, dude![n]{f 1 5 0}i'll be at the strip mall, so hurry on over after you see this {f 1 3 140}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}we're going! no ifs ands or buts about it! i mean, we just gotta![n]{f 1 5 0}come find me when you're free[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}let's catch a meal together sometime. we can go whenever you have time[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}sorry for sounding like a broken record, but i gotta talk to you about something. so... please just hear me out[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}hey, lemme know if you got time today {f 1 3 136}[n]{f 1 1}
